provider_google_description.message: Uses the free, public Google Translate endpoint. No API key is required.

provider_googlev2_description.message: Robust version of Google Translate using secure tokens and browser-like headers. More stable for large texts. No API key required.

provider_yandex_description.message: Uses the free, public Yandex Translate endpoint. No API key is required.

provider_deepl_description.message: AI-powered translation service by DeepL. Requires an API key.

provider_bing_description.message: Uses the free, public Microsoft Bing Translator endpoint. No API key is required.

provider_edge_description.message: Official Microsoft Edge browser translation service. Faster and more stable. No API key required.

provider_lingva_description.message: Free open-source Google Translate front-end. Privacy-focused and decentralized. No API key required.

provider_gemini_description.message: AI-powered translation with context understanding. Requires an API key.

provider_openai_description.message: AI translation using GPT models. Requires an API key.

provider_openrouter_description.message: Access to multiple AI models via OpenRouter. Requires an API key.

provider_deepseek_description.message: DeepSeek AI models for translation. Fast and efficient. Requires an API key.

provider_webai_description.message: Local server for AI model access. No API key required for local instances.

provider_browser_description.message: Built-in browser translation API (Chrome 138+). Supports offline translation.

provider_custom_description.message: Custom OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Configure your own URL and key.

provider_mock_description.message: A simulated provider used for development and testing.

options_error_same_languages.message: Source and target languages cannot be the same.

export_settings_description.message: Export your current settings to a JSON file for backup or sharing.

import_settings_description.message: Importing will overwrite your current settings. The page will reload after a successful import.

tts_tab_desc.message: Configure voice settings and pronunciation engines.

tts_engine_desc.message: Choose the default engine for text pronunciation. Edge TTS provides higher quality neural voices.

tts_fallback_desc.message: Automatically switch to an alternative engine or similar language if the primary selection is unsupported.

tts_autodetect_desc.message: Automatically identify the text language before pronunciation to ensure the correct voice is used.

notification_update_message.message: {appName} updated to v{version}. See what's new.

ERRORS_TRANSLATION_TIMEOUT.message: Translation timed out. Please try again.

ERRORS_SETTINGS_LOADING_TIMEOUT.message: Settings loading timed out. Please try again.

help_shortcut_content_p1.message: In Firefox, shortcuts are managed through the Add-ons page:

help_shortcut_content_li1.message: Navigate to **about:addons** in your address bar.

help_shortcut_content_li2.message: Click the **gear icon (⚙️)** in the top-right corner.

help_shortcut_content_li3.message: Select **Manage Extension Shortcuts** from the menu.

help_shortcut_content_li4.message: Find **Translate It** and set your desired shortcut.

help_api_keys_title.message: Where do I get API keys?

help_api_keys_content.message: You can find links to each API provider's website in the **API** tab. You will need to create an account on their respective platforms to generate a key.

help_free_providers_google.message: Google Translate - Uses the public Google Translate endpoint

help_free_providers_bing.message: Microsoft Bing - Uses the public Bing Translate endpoint

help_free_providers_yandex.message: Yandex Translate - Uses the public Yandex Translate endpoint

help_api_providers_gemini.message: Google Gemini - Get your free API key from [Google AI Studio]({url})

help_api_providers_deepseek.message: DeepSeek - Get API access from [DeepSeek Platform]({url})

help_security_notice_content.message: Your API keys are stored locally in your browser and are never shared with third parties. For additional security, you can encrypt your settings when exporting them using the Import/Export feature.

help_shortcut_content_chrome_li3.message: Click the pencil icon (✏️) next to **Translate It** and type your new shortcut.

extension_enabled_description.message: Enable or disable the entire extension functionality except Popup and Sidepanel.

show_desktop_fab_description.message: Display a floating action button on desktop to quickly access tools like Translate Page and Select Element.

translate_on_text_fields_label.message: Showing translation Icon on text fields

translate_on_text_fields_description.message: Quick access to translation via icon directly within input/textarea fields.

enable_shortcut_for_text_fields_descript.message: Allow using the Ctrl+/ keyboard shortcut to trigger translation when inside a text field.

translate_with_select_element_descriptio.message: Allow triggering translation using a specific selection method (if implemented, e.g., selecting a whole paragraph).

show_select_element_in_context_menu_desc.message: Display the 'Select Element' option in the browser's right-click context menu.

translate_on_text_selection_description.message: Allow triggering translation automatically or via an icon after selecting text on the page.

mobile_page_auto_close_tooltip.message: Close dashboard automatically after starting translation

mobile_input_no_result_error.message: No translation found. Please try again.

mobile_input_paste_failed.message: Paste failed. Please allow clipboard access.

enable_replace_on_special_sites.message: Enable replace on special sites (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, etc)

require_ctrl_for_text_selection_label.message: Require Ctrl key for text selection translation

active_selection_icon_on_textfields_desc.message: Show translation icon when double clicking on text inside text fields (textarea).

enhanced_triple_click_drag_description.message: When enabled, triple-clicking to select a paragraph and then dragging to extend the selection will wait until you release the mouse before showing the translation. This prevents premature translation when you want to select multiple paragraphs.

enable_dictionary_translation_descriptio.message: When text selection translation is enabled, single words or short phrases will be treated as dictionary lookups, providing detailed definitions instead of standard translations.

prompt_template_info.message: Use keywords to customize your prompt...

prompt_template_placeholder.message: Enter your prompt template here. Use keywords like $_{SOURCE}, $_{TARGET}, and $_{TEXT}.

prompt_template_help.message: You can use the following keywords in your prompt template:

gemini_api_key_info.message: You can get your Gemini API key from Google AI Studio.

openai_api_key_info.message: You can get your OpenAI API key from OpenAI Platform.

deepseek_api_key_info.message: You can get your DeepSeek API key from DeepSeek Platform.

openrouter_api_key_info.message: You can get your OpenRouter API key from OpenRouter Platform.

webai_api_key_info.message: You can get and run your locally hosted WebAI API server.

gemini_api_url_info.message: Leave empty to use the default Gemini API endpoint

gemini_custom_model_info.message: Enter the exact model name as provided by Google

gemini_custom_api_url_info.message: Enter the complete API URL including the model name

lingva_api_url_info.message: You can use public Lingva instances or host your own.

openrouter_api_key_placeholder.message: Paste your OpenRouter API key here

deepseek_api_key_placeholder.message: Paste your DeepSeek API key here

deepl_api_key_info.message: You can get your DeepL API key from

deepl_api_key_placeholder.message: Paste your DeepL API key here

deepl_free_tier_description.message: Free API endpoint with 500,000 characters/month limit. Uses api-free.deepl.com

deepl_pro_tier_description.message: Pro API endpoint with higher limits based on your subscription. Uses api.deepl.com

deepl_formality_description.message: Control the formality level of translations. Some languages may not support all options.

deepl_beta_languages_description.message: Enable support for beta languages. Beta languages do not support formality settings.

custom_api_settings_description.message: Use any service that is compatible with the OpenAI chat completions format.

custom_api_key_placeholder.message: Paste your custom API key here

export_password_placeholder.message: Create a strong password to protect your API keys

import_password_placeholder.message: Enter the password used during export

security_warning_message.message:
You are about to export your settings WITHOUT password protection.
Your API keys will be saved in PLAIN TEXT and readable by anyone.

🔒 For security, it's STRONGLY recommended to use a password.

security_warning_question.message: Do you want to continue without password protection?

debug_section_description.message: Enable detailed logging for specific components. Overrides global log level.

proxy_section_description.message: Configure proxy settings for providers with geographical restrictions (e.g., Gemini from Iran)

proxy_test_failed.message: Proxy connection failed. Check your settings.

direct_test_failed.message: Direct connection failed. Please check your internet.

proxy_not_enabled.message: Please enable proxy first to test connection.

proxy_warning_message.message: Browser extensions cannot directly use proxy servers due to security restrictions. This setting configures the intent, but actual proxy usage may require additional setup or may work differently than expected.

proxy_config_invalid.message: Invalid proxy configuration. Please check your settings.

proxy_host_invalid.message: Invalid hostname. Please enter a valid domain name or IP address.

SIDEPANEL_SELECT_ELEMENT_MESSAGE.message: Click on any element on the webpage to translate...

CONFIRM_CLEAR_ALL_HISTORY.message: Are you sure you want to clear all translation history?

browser_api_description.message: Private translations using the built-in browser engine. No external server requests are required.

browser_api_requirements_storage.message: A large free storage space (at least 22 GB)

browser_api_requirements_internet.message: Unmetered network connection for initial download

gemini_model_title.message: Select Gemini model or custom URL

ERRORS_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN.message: Circuit breaker is open. This provider is temporarily disabled due to too many failures. Please try another provider or try again in a few minutes.

ERRORS_INVALID_CONTEXT.message: Extension context invalid. Please refresh the page to continue.

ERRORS_NETWORK_ERROR.message: Network Error. Please check your internet connection.

ERRORS_HTTP_ERROR.message: HTTP Error communicating with the server.

ERRORS_BROWSER_API_UNAVAILABLE.message: Chrome Translation API is not available. This feature requires Chrome 138 or newer.

ERRORS_API_KEY_INVALID.message: API Key is invalid or unauthorized.

ERRORS_MODEL_MISSING.message: The selected AI Model is missing or invalid.

ERRORS_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE.message: Insufficient balance or credits for the selected API.

ERRORS_FORBIDDEN_ERROR.message: Access denied. Check permissions or potential content moderation.

ERRORS_RATE_LIMIT_REACHED.message: Rate limit reached. Please pace your requests or try again later.

ERRORS_SERVER_ERROR.message: The service provider's server encountered an error. Please try again later.

ERRORS_MODEL_OVERLOADED.message: The AI Model is currently overloaded. Please try again in a moment.

ERRORS_QUOTA_EXCEEDED.message: You have exceeded your quota for this API.

ERRORS_DEEPL_QUOTA_EXCEEDED.message: DeepL character limit exceeded. Free tier: 500,000 chars/month. Check your DeepL account settings or upgrade your plan.

ERRORS_GEMINI_QUOTA_REGION.message: Gemini quota exceeded, which may be due to a region-specific limit.

ERRORS_IMPORT_PASSWORD_REQUIRED.message: Password is required to import encrypted settings.

ERRORS_LANGUAGE_PAIR_NOT_SUPPORTED.message: The selected language pair is not supported by Chrome Translation API. Please try a different translation service or language combination.

gemini_thinking_description.message: Allow the model to think step-by-step before responding.

prompt_source_help.message: Select the source language for your prompt.

prompt_target_help.message: Select the target language for your prompt.

prompt_text_help.message: Enter the text you want to translate or process.

export_success_plaintext.message: Settings exported successfully (API keys saved in plain text).

font_settings_description.message: Customize the font and size for translation display

font_size_invalid.message: Font size must be a valid number

font_size_range_error.message: Font size must be between 10 and 30 pixels

SELECT_ELEMENT_MODE_ACTIVATED.message: Click on any text element to translate.

SELECT_ELEMENT_MODE_ACTIVATED_MOBILE.message: Drag your finger over any text to translate.

LINGVA_WPT_WARNING.message: Lingva may fail on long texts.

BING_WPT_WARNING.message: Bing may fail on long texts.

api_key_tips.message: 💡 Enter one API key per line

validation_same_languages.message: Source and target languages cannot be the same.

validation_api_key_empty.message: API key for {provider} cannot be empty.

validation_api_key_too_short.message: API key appears to be too short.

validation_api_key_invalid.message: API key must be at least 10 characters with no spaces

validation_import_file_required.message: Please select a file to import.

validation_import_file_too_large.message: File size must be less than 5MB.

validation_max_length.message: Must be no more than {max} characters

validation_invalid_email.message: Must be a valid email address

history_no_results_hint.message: Try adjusting your search or filters

history_clear_confirm_message.message: Are you sure you want to clear all translation history?

history_delete_confirm_message.message: Are you sure you want to delete this translation?

history_bulk_delete_confirm_message.message: Are you sure you want to delete {count} translations?

window_show_original.message: Show Original Text (Then use speaker button to listen to original)

window_hide_original.message: Hide Original Text (TTS button now speaks original text)

whole_page_translation_enabled_descripti.message: Allow translating the entire web page content while maintaining the layout.

whole_page_lazy_loading_description.message: Only translate parts of the page that are visible or near the viewport. Highly recommended for performance.

whole_page_auto_translate_on_dom_changes.message: Automatically detect and translate new content as it appears (e.g., when scrolling down on Twitter or Substack).

whole_page_show_original_on_hover_descri.message: Show the original text in a tooltip when hovering over translated content.

select_element_show_original_on_hover_de.message: Show the original text in a tooltip when hovering over elements translated via Select Element.

whole_page_translate_after_scroll_stop_d.message: Only trigger translation when you stop scrolling. Best for performance and saving API credits.

whole_page_translate_fluid_description.message: Translate continuously with a slight delay during scrolling. More responsive but may increase API requests.

ai_context_translation_description.message: Sends page metadata (title, section) to AI models. This improves translation accuracy for short or ambiguous text. (Always enabled for DeepL)

ai_conversation_history_description.message: Keeps a short memory of recent translations in Select Element mode to improve consistency and context awareness. This can enhance translation quality, but may slightly increase token usage.

bilingual_translation_description.message: If the detected input language matches your target language, it will automatically translate back to your source language (or English if source is Auto).

optimization_description_ai.message: Choose between 'Economy' to maximize token efficiency, or 'Turbo' for the fastest possible UI updates.

optimization_description_traditional.message: Balance your API usage and IP stability against translation speed. Higher efficiency reduces request frequency to prevent rate-limiting.

language_detection_preferences_descripti.message: Set the priority language for shared scripts. This determines which language is preferred during 'Auto-detect' mode (e.g., to correctly distinguish Persian from similar languages).
